name: NextAgency API
description: NextAgency is an insurance agency management software and CRM. The API provides RESTful endpoints for managing cases (businesses), addresses, benefits, tasks, notes, sub-agents, carriers, contacts, VOIP recordings, employees, and users. Authentication is handled via OAuth 2.0.
